task:
OBJECTIVE: Create /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/commitments/save/route.ts

POST handler. Called after Stripe payment confirms. Saves the commitment to Neon DB.

Imports:
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { saveCommitment, initSchema } from "@/lib/db";

Accept JSON body: { paymentIntentId: string, commitmentText: string, stakeAmount: number, forfeitDestination: string, avoidedTruth: string }

Validate all fields present and non-empty. Return 400 if any missing.

Call initSchema() first.

Call saveCommitment({
  commitment_text: commitmentText,
  stake_amount: stakeAmount,
  forfeit_destination: forfeitDestination,
  avoided_truth: avoidedTruth,
  due_date: new Date(Date.now() + 86400000).toISOString(),
  status: "pending",
  stripe_payment_intent_id: paymentIntentId
})

Return: { success: true, id }
On error return 500 with { error: message }.

File header comment and JSDoc on POST export.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/api/commitments/save/route.ts

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
POST handler exported
Calls initSchema before saveCommitment
Returns id
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: hardcode anything
DO NOT: use ast.parse
